intentional_changes.change: Extract canonical rank_key/rank_candidates in field_candidates.py (no production wiring).
Parse-time amount selection delegates to rank_key/rank_candidates(context=parse).
Resolver unified on rank_key/rank_candidates; ident helpers remain legacy aliases.
Unmatched suppliers route parser winners through resolve_field(empty overrides).
Parser field scalars written only via apply_resolved_field_result after resolve_field.
Field status assigned only in _build_result; payment_engine reads status read-only.
Production matched/unmatched paths set resolver_finalized=true after resolve_field (metadata only; winners unchanged).
Remove unused G5 dead resolver/candidate helpers.

remaining_architecture_gaps.detail: Post-resolve status mutation on user-repair paths (resolved.status / resolved_dict status).
Parse-stage field status is decided before resolve_field (separate from resolver status authority).
Legacy amount_source/amount_confidence mirror writes after apply_generic_field_resolution.
Direct date_dict status assignment outside resolver pipeline.
Three documented parse-vs-resolver ranking divergences (K-prefix, cross-field penalty, amount key shape).
